```{r }
escape_rgx <- function(string, word_delim = FALSE) {

# string <- gsub("([.[\\(*+?{|^$])", "\\\\\\1", string)
  # string <- gsub(r"---([\\\\.])---", "\\\\\\1", string)
  string <- string |> 
    gsub(x=_, "\\.", r"(\\.)")
  # string <- gsub("[\\\\\\\\.]", "\\\\\\1", string)
  message(string)

# string <- gsub("[\\.\\(\\*\\+\\?\\{\\|\\^\\$]", "\\\\\\1", string)

  if (word_delim) {
    string <- paste0("\\b", string, "\\b")
  }
  return(string)
}

escape_rgx("Mr. John", word_delim = TRUE)
```
